{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212242362A080DCF76C5302E222F"}"},"total":23},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7557885206825501502","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书切入点很小，但是很深入，可见是资深玩家了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759709823,"group_id":"7533548949542554649","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3ej6qUV2/c2tuQGvIonSeI3VxJVrZkbKVeRwZf5E5Ok","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p-passport-sign.bytedance.net/tos-cn-i-mgtsoo0paj/user-avatar_38620c49ca308a6842b0dd5b4d17b468~tplv-noop.jpeg?x-orig-authkey=akmgtsoo0paj&x-orig-expires=2170395176&x-orig-sign=Xpzg1X%2F5kGQQ5p62A4mOwrZSgEo%3D","user_id":"2993347464790360","user_name":"爱吃剪刀脚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2993347464790360","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7533548949542554649","book_info":{"abstract":"纯2077世界观，无跨界融合。
不拆官配CP，主角非无敌，非爽文。
主角只玩过本体
主角被中间人锤，被公司狗锤，被黑客锤，被AI锤，被网络监察锤
赛博朋克是黑暗的，大公司是巨人，是不可战胜的，一个公司的小组长一句话就能决定一大票人的生死
魔蜥厉害吗？一辆装甲运兵车而已。
奇美拉厉害吗？一辆特种环境的作战坦克而已，连轻型主站坦克都不如。
地狱犬机甲厉害吗？一台实验室的安保机甲而已，只是看守一群没有战斗力的实验人员而已。
亚当.重锤厉害吗？一个安保队长而已，别说荒板三郎了，荒板华子一句话就能炒了他。
巴特莫斯厉害吗？摩根黑手厉害吗？他们在桌游里同时下线了，荒板甚至都不是派的军队和主战装备（有军用科技在场，所以不能让冲突升级，参考中印边境），就一个保安队就下线两个传奇。
游戏里V能杀穿荒坂塔？那是因为荒坂赖轩在内斗，V不过是被默许的一把刀。
再者说了夜之城是中立城市，不能直接派遣公司军队，来的都是自卫队。
2077用了和三体同样的表现手法。一个探测器，一个安保队长，一对自卫队，就打的那些传奇抬不起头来。这样不用写就能暗示公司的可怕。真惹急眼了公司直接用质量加速器扔陨石砸死你！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob81119349206e6fdcb4bc558d124b1fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"师妹莫怪我","author_id":"","book_id":"7533548949542554649","book_name":"赛博朋克：技术使用手册","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1093人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7533548954714112537","read_count":"1093","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"488526"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"154","tags":"科幻末世,赛博朋克,求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob81119349206e6fdcb4bc558d124b1fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288156&x-signature=3oCcnwBLrGsyEspBBUX2PfOfJh8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4347894230169751","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"50"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212242362A080DCF76C5302E222F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17235,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":3389},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1759712111,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600455474991809342","com
